message:
You know that one friend who always seems to freak out at the slightest hint of bad weather? Yep, that’s my buddy Jake. Last winter, when the forecast called for a snowstorm, he was ready to build an ark instead of just shoveling the driveway! 

While I chuckled at his over-the-top preparations, I couldn’t help but admire his enthusiasm for getting ready. It reminded me that even if we don’t need to go all out, it’s always a good idea to have a plan in place. A few extra blankets, some non-perishable snacks, and a way to stay warm can make a big difference. 

So, I took the time to check the supplies, and guess what? This little refresher helped me feel more at ease when the storm rolled in. 

Do you have a friend who tends to panic, or are you the one who keeps it cool? Let me know!
